Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Sorachi | title = [[:en:Sorachi Subprefecture|Sorachi Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|Cities]] | list1 = *[[:en:Akabira|Akabira]] *[[:en:Ashibetsu|Ashibetsu]] *[[:en:Bibai|Bibai]] *[[:en:Fukagawa, Hokkaido|Fukagawa]] *[[:en:Iwamizawa|Iwamizawa]] *[[:en:Mikasa, Hokkaido|Mikasa]] *[[:en:Sunagawa, Hokkaido|Sunagawa]] *[[:en:Takikawa, Hokkaido|Takikawa]] *[[:en:Utashinai|Utashinai]] *[[:en:Yūbari, Hokkaido|Yūbari]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Kabato District, Hokkaido|Kabato District]] **[[:en:Shintotsukawa, Hokkaido|Shintotsukawa]] **[[:en:Tsukigata, Hokkaido|Tsukigata]] **[[:en:Urausu, Hokkaido|Urausu]] *[[:en:Sorachi District, Hokkaido|Sorachi District]] **[[:en:Kamisunagawa, Hokkaido|Kamisunagawa]] **[[:en:Naie, Hokkaido|Naie]] **[[:en:Nanporo, Hokkaido|Nanporo]] *[[:en:Uryū District, Hokkaido|Uryū District]] **[[:en:Chippubetsu, Hokkaido|Chippubetsu]] **[[:en:Hokuryū, Hokkaido|Hokuryū]] **[[:en:Moseushi, Hokkaido|Moseushi]] **[[:en:Numata, Hokkaido|Numata]] **[[:en:Uryū, Hokkaido|Uryū]] *[[:en:Yūbari District, Hokkaido|Yūbari District]] **[[:en:Kuriyama, Hokkaido|Kuriyama]] **[[:en:Naganuma, Hokkaido|Naganuma]] **[[:en:Yuni, Hokkaido|Yuni]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
